query:
-- Verificação pós-limpeza
SELECT 'Total de leads restantes:' as info, COUNT(*) as total FROM leads;

-- Verificar se ainda há leads com telefones sequenciais
SELECT 'Leads com telefones sequenciais restantes (deve ser 0):' as info, COUNT(*) as total
FROM leads
WHERE 
  telefone LIKE '%00000%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%11111%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%22222%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%33333%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%44444%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%55555%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%66666%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%77777%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%88888%'
  OR telefone LIKE '%99999%';
